name: Hazelnut Praline
steps: Put the sugar and Chinkiang vinegar in a pan and make a caramel with it.
When it's dark, add the toasted hazelnuts in and coat all the nuts with it, like making a praline.
Pour the content onto a tray lined with parchment paper and let it cool.
Blitz until smooth paste while adding the other ingredients to make it a bit more loose.
Reheat before service, you might need to add some water to make it a bit looser.
